INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('abc=123, 8="hkl", name="test", value="value123"');
SELECT extractAllGroups(data, '(\w+)=5') FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE '%=5%';
SELECT extractAllGroups(replaceAll(data, '"', ''), '([\w]+)=([\w]+)') FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE '%=%';
SELECT arrayJoin(extractAllGroups(data, '([\w]+)=([\w]+)')) AS groups FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_table AS SELECT extractAllGroups(data, '([\w]+)=([\w]+)') AS groups FROM test_table;
SELECT groups[1], groups[2] FROM nested_table WHERE length(groups) > 0;
SELECT extractAllGroups(data, '([\w]+)=([\w]+)') FROM (SELECT data FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT 'test=case=123');
SELECT extractAllGroups(data, '([\w]+)=\"([^"]+)\"') FROM (SELECT data FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE '%=%') AS sub_query;
